title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.315 - Contract for service authorized
text:
190.315.  Contract for service authorized. — Any governing body imposing the tax authorized herein may contract directly with the provider of the emergency telephone service or may contract and cooperate with any public agency or with other states or their political subdivisions or with any association or corporation for the administration of emergency telephone service as provided by law.
(L. 1981 H.B. 437 § 4, A.L. 1986 H.B. 1268)
